name: Skewered Shrimp on Sugar Cane W/Mango Lime Salsa (Gc)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub shrimp with Caribbean seasoning and skewer. Let sit for 10 minutes.
2. Peel sugar cane and slice on the bias into thin pieces.
3. Prepare a wood or charcoal fire and let it burn down to embers.
4. In a mixing bowl combine lime zest, diced mango, coriander, ginger, half of the reserved lime juice, and molasses. Mix well.
5. Add the sugar cane and let rest for 15 minutes.
6. Remove sugar cane from marinade and grill for 1 minute on both sides.
7. Grill shrimp for 2 minutes on each side.
8. Place shrimp on sugar cane and drizzle with remaining marinade.
